overview: TradeLog Journal is a Gen Z-focused trading journal web app with a dark mode aesthetic, neon accents, and glassmorphism design. It enables traders to log, analyze, and reflect on trades with a freemium model, coupon code redemption, and an admin panel for the creator.
features: Full trade log with predictive pair/instrument suggestions
Performance dashboard with win rate, P&L, drawdown, and R:R metrics
Chart screenshot upload with annotation tools
Freemium gating: free tier (5/day, 25 total), paid tier ($9.99/month, unlimited)
Admin panel for creator with full feature access and coupon management
Coupon code system with preset perks (permanent upgrade, free months, feature unlocks, custom)
Coupon code redemption page for users
Analytics dashboard with blurred insights for free users
